name: Hugs and Kisses Valentine Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces and coarsely chop them.
3. In a large bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Gradually add granulated sugar and brown sugar, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
7. Mix in the chopped chocolate pieces.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
10. Frost as desired. Arrange additional chocolate pieces in a heart shape on top of the cake.
Serves: 12 to 16
